strengths: Extensive 15+ years in software engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud)
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP, agentic workflows, TypeScript/Node.js)
Entrepreneurial background with founding GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) and freelance work
concerns: Lacks explicit AI/ML education or advanced AI product development experience
No clear evidence of cloud platform strategy or customer advisory work in resume
Minimal mention of academic/entrepreneurial experience in larger organizations
response.justification: Aisha has strong software engineering fundamentals and recent AI-adjacent work (agent infrastructure), but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML expertise, cloud platform strategy, or customer advisory experience required for the role. The entrepreneurial experience is notable but not directly aligned with AI strategy leadership.
